chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 2013 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.01.2016 1. For Orders on MA 1051/16 2. For Orders on Office Objection 3. For Katcha Peshi 4. For Orders on MA 9773/15 Mr. Imamuddin Otho, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel Petitioner has filed this petition against the alleged harassment caused to him by respondent Nos. 4 to 6. Learned State counsel has filed comments on behalf of respondent Nos. 2 to 6 and states that the official respondents will provide due protection of law to the petitioner. This statement has satisfied the counsel for petitioner and seeks disposal of this petition in these terms. Accordingly this petition is disposed of with direction to Respondent No.3 to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Karar/-
